message:
refactor(fcp-store): improve object and symbol store reliability

Enhance storage layer reliability:

object_store.rs:
- Better error handling for storage operations
- Improve atomic write semantics
- Add validation helpers

symbol_store.rs:
- Improve symbol resolution performance
- Better caching for frequently accessed symbols
- Add cleanup for stale entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
